title: Add logging to tts-notify.py
description:
## Decision
Log file location: logs/tts-notify.log

## Rationale
- Fully contained within plugin directory (no external paths)
- Conventional logs/ directory name
- Discoverable for debugging
- Filename matches script name (tts-notify.py → tts-notify.log)

## Implementation
1. Create logs/ directory if not exists
2. Add file logging to scripts/tts-notify.py
3. Log hook invocations, threshold checks, TTS events

## Already done
- .gitignore updated to exclude logs/
